title: Commentary on Policy/Limits Compliance: 03-31-2026
content:
The credit union remains compliant in most areas with board-approved policy limits, supported by strong asset-quality and capital-position data. However, several metrics fall below preferred ranges or targets.

Asset Quality:
Asset quality remains generally satisfactory. Classified assets/Net worth of 3% remain within the limit of <40%, while delinquent loans/Total loans of 0% remain within the limit of <1.5%. Net charge-offs/Average loans of 0% also remain below the threshold of <0.75%.

Capital & Solvency:
Capital remains a key strength, with net worth ratio and solvency metrics meeting policy benchmarks, providing a substantial buffer against potential losses. However, net worth growth of 9% falls below the target of >=5% YoY.

Profitability & Growth:
Profitability metrics remain generally favorable. Net margin/Average assets of 3%, return on average assets of 1%, and operating expenses/average assets of 1% all comply with policy guidelines. However, net interest margin/Average assets of 2% falls below the target level of >=3.00%. Growth metrics remain mixed, with loan growth at 11% exceeding expectations but membership growth at -2% falling short.

Interest Rate & Funding:
Liquidity and funding metrics are within preferred ranges for most categories. Cost of funds/average assets (1%), cash and short-term investments/total assets (17%), yield on average loans (6%), and regular shares/total shares & borrowings (11%) all comply with policy benchmarks. However, total loans/total assets at 16% remains weak and below the minimum target of 65%-80%, while total loans/total shares at 19% also falls short.

Closing:
The credit union's genuine strengths lie in its robust asset quality metrics and capital buffers that ensure stability. Concern areas include membership growth lagging behind targets, net interest margin falling below expectations, and liquidity ratios dipping under preferred ranges. Moving forward, the CEO will focus on addressing these gaps to enhance overall performance.
